title: 3001 E Madison Park - Parks | seattle.gov
content: # 3001 E Madison Park. 3001 E Madison St., Seattle, WA 98112. Phone: (206) 684-4075 684-4075). 3001 E Madison Park from sidewalk. 3001 E Madison Park from P-Patch. 3001 E Madison Park neightborhood views. Named for its address, this park is a small sloped green space with deciduous trees and ground cover. title: Add Your Review - The Attic Madison Park
